case_title: APPLE SOCAL II LLC VS. APPLE CORE ENTERPRISES, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APPLE SOCAL II LLC AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE CORE ENTERPRISES, INC. DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-18-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-17-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2017
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100025889)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-22-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100016093), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF APPLE SOCAL II LLC SERVED MAY-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE CORE ENTERPRISES, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-09-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-22-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-09-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
